title: Vevo Presents: The 1975
original_title: The 1975: Live at The O2, London
overview: The 1975's break-out arena show at London's iconic venue, The O2 Arena. This performance saw the conception of the band's first official live album 'DH00278' and is seen by many as an important cornerstone in the group's meteoric rise to success.
